attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
	SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_DATES_POS CRD
	ON NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = CRD.CALENDAR_DATE 
	AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
	GROUP BY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			 DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
			 WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
	         SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

SELECT 
	CALENDAR_DATE
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY
	WHERE RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,1,2) AND
	NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_PROC_DATES_CHANNEL_MTX_POS OPNMTH
	WHERE OPNMTH.BK_CALENDAR_DATE = RFDTY.CALENDAR_DATE)
